news.summary: In Woking, England, Linde (Nasdaq: LIN) shared its 2024 Sustainable Development Report, highlighting advancements toward sustainability targets. The company successfully decreased its absolute greenhouse gas emissions by 6.2% from the 2021 baseline, aligning with the 2035 reduction goal. This progress involved various initiatives worldwide, such as procuring 47% of total electricity from low-carbon sources. Linde continues to strive for environmental sustainability through its ongoing efforts.
news.headline: Linde's 2024 report shows 6.2% reduction in greenhouse gas emissions, 47% electricity from low-carbon sources.

news.summary: Blockdaemon recently introduced Earn Stack, an institutional service that provides DeFi yield farming and PoS staking on over 50 protocols. This service is non-custodial, catering specifically to institutional clients in the cryptocurrency space. Earn Stack offers opportunities for users to generate passive income through decentralized finance activities and participating in proof-of-stake networks. This initiative reflects Blockdaemon's commitment to expanding its offerings and catering to the evolving demands of the market.
news.headline: Blockdaemon introduces non-custodial staking & DeFi stack for institutions, supporting 50+ protocols for PoS & yield farming opportunities.
Foxconn and NVIDIA Discuss Using Humanoid Robots in New Houston Factory for NVIDIA AI Servers

news.summary: In New York, Franklin BSP Realty Trust, Inc. (NYSE: FBRT) made an announcement concerning a private offering through its operating partnership, FBRT OP LLC. The offering involved issuing $107 million in total aggregate principal amount of unsecured senior notes. This amount included $82 million of 8.25% unsecured senior notes due 2030 (referred to as the Fixed Rate Notes) and $25 million of floating rate unsecured senior notes due 2028, with an initial coupon rate of approximately 8.33%.
news.headline: Franklin BSP Realty Trust issues $107M of unsecured senior notes, $82M fixed rate notes due 2030, $25M floating rate notes due 2028.

news.summary: Starting June 20, 2025, customers will have the convenience of shopping via the "Doorzo" platform, allowing direct access to Mercari, Rakuma, and Rakuten Ichiba. This initiative comes through the collaboration between SIG Service INC. based in Kita-ku, Tokyo, led by Zhang Zhang, and the mentioned online marketplaces. This new partnership opens up an array of options for customers looking to explore and purchase products with ease.
news.headline: Doorzo partners with Mercari, Rakuma, and Rakuten Ichiba, enabling direct shopping through its platform, expanding global reach.

news.summary: In Chicago on June 20, 2025, Clarus introduced an updated showroom design and innovative glass ideas, debuting their inaugural digital glassboard at NeoCon 2025. The Clarus showroom, a popular attraction at NeoCon, showcases stylish displays, lively music, and modern products.
news.headline: Clarus reveals revamped showroom at NeoCon 2025, showcasing new glass designs and digital glassboard.

news.summary: On June 20, 2025, in Miami, Arkay Beverages, a leading company in alcohol-free spirits, revealed that their top-selling products, including Arkay Zero Proof Whisky, Gin, Rum, and Vodka, have secured the top spot for sales in their category on The Liquor Mall USA. Consumers can purchase these acclaimed products through the official website.
news.headline: Arkay Whisky, Gin, Rum & Vodka Zero Proof leads sales on The Liquor Mall USA, gaining #1 spot in sales. #AlcoholFreeSuccess

news.summary: On June 18, 2025, HomeSafe Alliance, a joint venture of KBR (NYSE: KBR), headquartered in Houston, was informed that its participation in the Global Household Goods Contract by the U.S. Transportation Command (TRANSCOM) has been terminated. This contract aimed to enhance the relocation process for military service members and their families worldwide.
news.headline: KBR's JV HomeSafe Alliance loses role in Global Household Goods Contract by TRANSCOM aimed at aiding military moves.

news.summary: In Jacksonville, Florida, on June 20, 2025, Everything Blockchain Inc. revealed its plan to invest $10 million across five top-performing blockchain networks. The targeted networks include Solana (SOL), XRP, Sui (SUI), Bittensor (TAO), and Hyperliquid (HYPE). This strategic move is aimed at staying ahead of the upcoming institutional crypto trend.
news.headline: Everything Blockchain Inc. will invest $10M in Solana, XRP, Sui, Bittensor, and Hyperliquid to stay ahead in the institutional crypto market.

news.summary: In recent developments, it has been reported that the global economy is forecasted to grow by approximately 4.5% in 2021, a significant increase from the 3.5% decline experienced in 2020 due to the COVID-19 pandemic. This growth is attributed to the gradual easing of lockdown measures and increasing vaccination rates. However, there are concerns about the unequal distribution of vaccines, with estimates suggesting that only 10% of people in low-income countries will be vaccinated by the end of 2021. Additionally, the global debt has risen to a record high of $281 trillion, equivalent to 355% of the world's GDP. Experts warn that addressing these economic disparities and managing debt levels will be critical to ensuring sustainable and inclusive growth in the post-pandemic era.
news.headline: South Africa's stocks expected to break decade-long streak of foreign outflows.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.2%, the lowest it has been in over a decade. The report also indicated that the economy added 250,000 new jobs in the past month, surpassing economists' expectations. Additionally, the stock market saw a significant increase, with the main indexes jumping by 5% in response to the positive economic news. Experts predict that this trend of job growth and economic improvement is likely to continue in the coming months.
news.headline: South African stocks forecasted to halt decade-long foreign outflows.

The total number of cases has now reached X, with Y new cases identified in the past 24 hours alone. news.summary: Loffler Companies, based in Minneapolis, has built a strong reputation as an award-winning service provider by focusing on client feedback and providing cutting-edge technology solutions. Their commitment to innovation has earned them a spot on the prestigious 2025 CRN Solution Provider 500 list. This recognition showcases Loffler's outstanding performance in the industry, highlighting their dedication to delivering top-notch services.
news.headline: Loffler Companies recognized on 2025 CRN Solution Provider 500 list as a leading IT partner in North America.

news.summary: On June 25, 2025, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority is set to hold a tender for the re-opening of 5-year HKD Government Bonds. The tender will offer HK$1.25 billion in total, with an attractive interest rate of 2.70% per annum. This presents a valuable opportunity for investors looking to participate in government bond investments.
news.headline: HK Monetary Authority to reopen 5-year Govt Bonds in June 2025, offering HK$1.25 billion at 2.70% interest.

news.summary: The Hong Kong Monetary Authority has disclosed a solicitation for the reissue of 3-year HKD government bonds, providing a total of HK$1.25 billion. The tender is scheduled for June 25, 2025.
news.headline: Hong Kong to reopen HK$1.25 billion 3-year gov't bonds on June 25, 2025, per HK Monetary Auth. Tender announced.

news.summary: The IOTA Foundation is increasing its focus on enhancing blockchain expertise worldwide by prioritizing education, hackathons, and collaborations. These efforts aim to promote the practical application of decentralized technology on a global scale.
news.headline: IOTA Foundation working on bridging the blockchain skills gap worldwide through education, hackathons, and partnerships.

news.summary: The well-known Borderlands franchise has been added to GeForce NOW, along with the highly anticipated release of Borderlands 4. Players can now access a total of 13 new games through cloud streaming, with additional updates being made to popular title Genshin Impact. This expansion offers gamers a diverse selection of titles to enjoy, further enhancing their gaming experience.
news.headline: Borderlands series, including 13 new games, now on GeForce NOW cloud gaming platform with upcoming Borderlands 4 release.

news.summary: The VeBetter Super App by VeChain has reached a milestone with two of its features, Mugshot and Greencart, attracting over 1 million users combined. This achievement signifies a substantial advancement in the adoption of Web3 technology and sustainability efforts.
news.headline: VeChain's VeBetter Super App hits 1M users with Mugshot and Greencart, showcasing progress in Web3 adoption & sustainability.

news.summary: Sei Network's blockchain technology is ready to back a growing AI agent industry estimated to hit $200 billion by 2034, transforming the landscape of self-governing trade.
news.headline: Sei Network set to fuel $200B AI agent economy by 2034, reshaping autonomous commerce with its blockchain system.

news.summary: Despite Bitcoin reaching high prices, the network is seeing a decrease in transaction activity. This suggests a move towards off-chain platforms and an increase in control by major players. This trend highlights the evolving nature of the cryptocurrency market, with the number of transactions on the Bitcoin network declining as prices rise. This shift indicates a growing reliance on alternative avenues outside the main network for trading and investing in Bitcoin.
news.headline: BTC network sees decrease in transactions despite price rise, suggesting migration to off-chain methods & rise of big players.

news.summary: BounceBit recently launched BounceBit Trade, a futures trading platform that delivers top-notch performance. It provides traders with the option of utilizing up to 50 times leverage and boasts smooth integration with CeDeFi.
news.headline: BounceBit debuts BounceBit Trade, a futures platform enabling up to 50x leverage with CeDeFi integration.

news.summary: GitHub has recently launched Copilot Spaces to boost AI-powered coding support, enabling developers to generate customized environments with rich context. This feature aims to enhance coding assistance by providing tailored settings for individual requirements. By incorporating Copilot Spaces, developers can optimize their coding experience and streamline their workflow. This update reflects GitHub's commitment to refining AI-driven tools to cater to the unique needs of developers. This new feature is expected to revolutionize the coding process by offering personalized solutions. It provides a creative way for developers to leverage AI in their coding practices, shaping a more productive and efficient development environment.
news.headline: GitHub releases Copilot Spaces to improve AI coding help with customized context-rich environments, aiding devs.

news.summary: Hong Kong Monetary Authority and the People’s Bank of China have introduced Payment Connect, a new cross-boundary payment system aimed at boosting financial transactions between Hong Kong and Mainland China. This system is expected to streamline transactions and facilitate smoother payments between the two regions.
news.headline: HKMA and PBoC team up for Payment Connect launch, boosting financial transactions between Hong Kong and Mainland China.
